root_text.an4.110:1.8: Evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, cattāro āsīvisūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmiṁ.
root_text.an4.110:2.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo āgataviso hoti, na ghoraviso?
root_text.an4.110:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo abhiṇhaṁ kujjhati.
root_text.an4.110:2.3: So ca khvassa kodho na dīgharattaṁ anuseti.
root_text.an4.110:2.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo āgataviso hoti, na ghoraviso.
root_text.an4.110:2.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, āsīviso āgataviso, na ghoraviso;
root_text.an4.110:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo ghoraviso hoti, na āgataviso?
root_text.an4.110:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo na heva kho abhiṇhaṁ kujjhati.
root_text.an4.110:3.3: So ca khvassa kodho dīgharattaṁ anuseti.
root_text.an4.110:3.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo ghoraviso hoti, na āgataviso.
root_text.an4.110:3.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, āsīviso ghoraviso, na āgataviso;
root_text.an4.110:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo āgataviso ca hoti ghoraviso ca?
root_text.an4.110:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo abhiṇhaṁ kujjhati.
root_text.an4.110:4.3: So ca khvassa kodho dīgharattaṁ anuseti.
root_text.an4.110:4.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo āgataviso ca hoti ghoraviso ca.
root_text.an4.110:4.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, āsīviso āgataviso ca ghoraviso ca;
root_text.an4.110:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, puggalo nevāgataviso hoti na ghoraviso?
root_text.an4.110:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo na heva kho abhiṇhaṁ kujjhati.
root_text.an4.110:5.3: So ca khvassa kodho na dīgharattaṁ anuseti.
root_text.an4.110:5.4: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo nevāgataviso hoti, na ghoraviso.
root_text.an4.110:5.5: Seyyathāpi so, bhikkhave, āsīviso nevāgataviso na ghoraviso;
root_text.an4.110:5.7: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro āsīvisūpamā puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.110:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four kinds of viper.
translation_text.an4.110:1.3: One whose venom is fast-acting but not lethal,
translation_text.an4.110:1.4: one whose venom is lethal but not fast-acting,
translation_text.an4.110:1.5: one whose venom is both fast-acting and lethal, and
translation_text.an4.110:1.6: one whose venom is neither fast-acting nor lethal.
translation_text.an4.110:1.7: These are the four kinds of viper.
translation_text.an4.110:1.8: In the same way, these four individuals similar to vipers are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.110:1.10: One whose venom is fast-acting but not lethal,
translation_text.an4.110:1.11: one whose venom is lethal but not fast-acting,
translation_text.an4.110:1.12: one whose venom is both fast-acting and lethal, and
translation_text.an4.110:1.13: one whose venom is neither fast-acting nor lethal.
translation_text.an4.110:2.1: And how is an individual’s venom fast-acting but not lethal?
translation_text.an4.110:2.2: It’s when an individual is often angry,
translation_text.an4.110:2.3: but their anger doesn’t linger long.
translation_text.an4.110:2.4: That’s how an individual’s venom is fast-acting but not lethal.
translation_text.an4.110:2.5: That individual is like a viper whose venom is fast-acting but not lethal.
translation_text.an4.110:3.1: And how is an individual’s venom lethal but not fast-acting?
translation_text.an4.110:3.2: It’s when an individual is not often angry,
translation_text.an4.110:3.3: but their anger lingers for a long time.
translation_text.an4.110:4.1: And how is an individual’s venom both fast-acting and lethal?
translation_text.an4.110:4.2: It’s when an individual is often angry,
translation_text.an4.110:4.3: and their anger lingers for a long time.
translation_text.an4.110:5.1: And how is an individual’s venom neither fast-acting nor lethal?
translation_text.an4.110:5.2: It’s when an individual is not often angry,
translation_text.an4.110:5.3: and their anger doesn’t linger long.
translation_text.an4.110:5.7: These four individuals similar to vipers are found in the world.”
